title: Split video-reverse into video&audio / video-only / audio-only
description: Video-viewer context menu currently has ONE 'Reverse video' item that reverses BOTH streams (route uses -vf reverse + -af areverse together). Rename it to 'Reverse video & audio' and add two new items: 'Reverse video' (video stream reversed, audio passthrough) and 'Reverse audio' (audio reversed, video passthrough). Backend: POST /api/video/reverse gains a `mode` param ('both'|'video'|'audio', default 'both' back-compat); branch ffmpeg args — video-only = -vf reverse + audio copy, audio-only = -af areverse + video copy (fast, no re-encode), both = current. Audio-only on a source with no audio must reject cleanly. Client: 3 menu items feeding one _handleReverseVideo(mode) handler. Icon 'reverse' already exists — reuse for all three. Files: routes/videoReverse.js, js/components/Blocks/MpiGroupHistoryBlock/MpiGroupHistoryBlock.js.
